meta.title: Nexora Tech | Software Development & Business Automation
meta.description: We develop custom software, automations, web applications and digital infrastructure for companies looking to grow and optimize their processes. Free consultation.
meta.ogTitle: Nexora Tech | Software Development & Business Automation
meta.ogDescription: Custom software, automation and AI for companies that need results, not promises.

hero.title: We build the software that grows your business.
hero.subtitle: Process automation, high-performance web development and AI integration for SMBs and enterprises that need results, not promises.

solutions.title: What problem do you need to solve?
solutions.subtitle: We don't sell technology. We solve business problems with the right technology for each case.

items.title: SMBs & Local Businesses
items.description: Your website is your 24/7 salesperson. We build it to load in under 2 seconds, rank on Google and convert visitors into real customers.

items.title: Mid-Size Companies
items.description: Every manual process we automate is time and money you recover. Management systems, dashboards and automated workflows that eliminate repetitive work.

items.title: Large Corporations
items.description: Infrastructures that support 10x growth without refactoring. React, TypeScript and generative AI for companies that can't afford slowness.

cases.title: Real results,
cases.subtitle: Every project has a real problem, a concrete technical solution and verifiable metrics.
cases.ctaText: Could your project be the next success case?

items.title: Intelligent Educational Ecosystem
items.problem: Students without a centralized tool to organize subjects, tasks and resources with intelligent assistance.
items.solution: Full-stack Web App with React + TypeScript + Firebase and Google Gemini integration for personalized academic recommendations in real time.
items.description: Complete educational platform with authentication, real-time database and operational AI assistant from day one.

items.title: Corporate WordPress Infrastructure
items.problem: WordPress site with red Core Web Vitals, 6.2 second LCP and loss of organic ranking on Google.
items.solution: Complete technical audit, image optimization, advanced caching, SEO on-page restructuring and heading structure correction.
items.description: Comprehensive technical optimization that turned all Core Web Vitals green and recovered the site's organic ranking.

items.title: Healthcare Automation
items.problem: Medical supply control in manual spreadsheets, with frequent errors and 15+ minute query times per operation.
items.solution: Web inventory management system with entry/exit control, minimum stock alerts and automatic reports.
items.description: Complete digitization of the inventory process for a public health institution with full movement traceability.

items.title: Parking Management System
items.problem: Parking lot with manual entry/exit records, inconsistent charges and no occupancy reports.
items.solution: Complete space management software, automatic rate calculation and daily/weekly/monthly reports.
items.description: Marketable product ready for sale to parking lots in Mexico with robust billing logic.

testimonials.title: What those who
testimonials.subtitle: Real companies that transformed their digital operations with NEXORATECH.

items.name: María González
items.text: NEXORATECH completely transformed our digital presence. The website loads in under 2 seconds and our conversions increased 40% in the first quarter.

items.name: Carlos Ramírez
items.text: The automated inventory system reduced our operational times by 35%. Professionalism and on-time delivery guaranteed.

items.name: Ana Martínez
items.text: Excellent communication throughout the project. The data dashboard allows us to make informed decisions in real time. Highly recommended.

items.name: Roberto Sánchez
items.text: The AI integration in our system exceeded our expectations. NEXORATECH demonstrated exceptional technical mastery and strategic vision.

process.title: Agile methodology,
process.subtitle: Full transparency at every stage. You know exactly what's being built and when it will be ready.
process.techSubtitle: We select the right technology for each project, not the one that's trending.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We analyze your needs, goals and audience. We audit your current infrastructure and identify bottlenecks.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: We design the architecture, wireframes and define the optimal technology stack for your specific case.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: We build your solution with clean, scalable and documented code. Partial deliveries so you can see progress.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: We deploy, optimize and train you. 30 days of technical support included at no additional cost.

guarantees.title: On-time delivery
guarantees.desc: We meet agreed deadlines or return the proportional amount.

guarantees.title: 30 days of support
guarantees.desc: Post-launch technical support included at no additional cost.

guarantees.title: Documented code
guarantees.desc: Clean, documented code delivered 100% to the client.

techStack.title: Frontend
techStack.content: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Angular

techStack.title: Backend & Cloud
techStack.content: Node.js, Firebase, MySQL, MongoDB, REST APIs

techStack.title: Optimization
techStack.content: Core Web Vitals, On-Page SEO, WordPress Pro, WCAG Accessibility

techStack.title: AI & Automation
techStack.content: Google Gemini, AWS SageMaker, Office Scripts, Git/GitHub

faq.title: We answer your
faq.subtitle: The most common questions before starting a project.
faq.ctaSubtitle: Write to us directly and we'll respond within 24 hours.

items.q: How long does it take to develop a project?
items.a: It depends on complexity. An optimized website takes 1-2 weeks. Complex web applications or AI integrations can take 4-8 weeks. In the initial consultation we give you an exact timeline with clear milestones.

items.q: What is the cost of your services?
items.a: Projects range from $500 USD for websites to $5,000+ USD for enterprise applications. We offer flexible payment plans (50% upfront, 50% on delivery) and personalized quotes.

items.q: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
items.a: Yes. We include 30 days of free technical support post-launch. Afterwards we offer monthly maintenance plans from $100 USD with updates, backups and priority support.

items.q: Do you work with clients outside Mexico?
items.a: Absolutely. We work with clients throughout Latin America and the United States. All communication is remote using modern collaborative tools.
React, TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js, Firebase, MySQL, MongoDB, WordPress and Google Gemini for AI. We select the optimal stack for each specific project.

items.q: What if I'm not satisfied with the result?
items.a: We work with unlimited revisions during development until you are 100% satisfied. If we don't meet what was agreed, we offer a proportional refund guarantee.

items.q: How does the payment process work?
items.a: 50% at the start of the project to reserve the schedule and begin development. The remaining 50% is paid upon approved final delivery. We accept bank transfer and PayPal.

contact.benefit1Desc: We review your case and contact you quickly.
contact.benefit2Desc: No cost, no commitment, no fine print.
contact.benefit3Desc: Custom solution according to your budget and goals.
